arts.ttl: Akanji to have surgery and miss up to 10 weeks
arts.sum: Manchester City defender Manuel Akanji will undergo surgery on a thigh injury on Saturday and is expected to be absent for up to 10 weeks.

arts.ttl: City v Newcastle programme: Classic cover, Savinho, Stones and much more
arts.sum: Our Newcastle United matchday programme cover celebrates our signings for the present and future with a nod to the past in the latest edition. And we’ve got all the latest info, stats and big news from across all the teams and areas of Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Man City identify 'complete' £20m playmaker from Champions League club as ideal Kevin De Bruyne replacement
arts.sum: He's had a similar career trajectory to the Belgian superstar!

arts.ttl: Newcastle United tried to sign me for £2m but it 'didn't feel right' - now I'm matching Salah - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: Eddie Howe's side expressed an interest in Robinson as they searched for post-takeover signings - but even before that predecessor Steve Bruce also tried to get a deal done when the full-back was free to leave Wigan Athletic on the cheap. Newcastle United saw this first hand earlier this month as Robinson teed up Raul Jimenez as the west London outfit stole all three points at St James' Park.

arts.ttl: Flat track bully, Shearer partner, instinct - Isak vs Haaland Newcastle verdict
arts.sum: If you had asked me this a year ago, I would have given you a different answer - Erling Haaland is a freak, after all - but Alexander Isak has added so much to his game in that time. Erling Haaland has the better goals record but then again look at the players he's had around him.

arts.ttl: Centre-back crisis, Anthony Gordon scare & City hoodoo - Newcastle United's four burning issues - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: Newcastle United head to the Etihad Stadium after 25 years without a Premier League victory and hoping that this weekend can be different. Burn limped off with a groin injury at Birmingham City on FA Cup fourth round day last weekend and has been classed doubtful all week - despite getting good news from a scan result.

arts.ttl: Man City predicted team vs Newcastle as Pep Guardiola faces right-back dilemma amid Ederson decision
arts.sum: Manchester City welcome Newcastle to the Etihad Stadium on Saturday afternoon

arts.ttl: Newcastle XI vs Man City – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Newcastle head to Manchester City this weekend aiming to end a torrid record at the Etihad. The Magpies have failed to win at the ground since a League Cup success in 2014. It’s been almost 25 years since the club’s last league win at Manchester City. Newcastle will be confident, however, with City having endured […] The post Newcastle XI vs Man City – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Premier League break silence after minister's Newcastle United ownership test claim
arts.sum: The Premier League have claimed a government minister was 'unable to confirm' if Saudi Arabia's Crown Prince would have to undergo the independent football regulator's owners' and directors' test. On an evening when Newcastle United were namechecked a whopping 20 times inside the chamber, Lord Moynihan asked Baroness Twycross, the parliamentary under-secretary of state at the department for culture, media and sport, if Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman would be subject to an ownership test during a House of Lords debate on the football governance bill a couple of months ago.

arts.ttl: Man City vs Newcastle Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
